zh.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh.St Pierre and Miquelon: 沙吉皮 艾特 米可隆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Menteith於大約1225年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith56歲，母親Mary Menteith42歲。她和Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1286年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾阿福爾。

zh-hans.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh-hans.St Pierre and Miquelon: 沙吉皮 艾特 米可隆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Menteith于大约1225年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith56岁，母亲Mary Menteith42岁。她和Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1286年在苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾阿福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Menteith was born about 1225, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith, was 56 and her mother, Mary Menteith, was 42. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith. She died in 1286, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Menteith est née environ 1225, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Mary Menteith, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith. Elle est décédée en 1286, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Menteith um 1225 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith 56 und ihre Mutter Mary Menteith 42. Sie hatte mit Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1286 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Menteith è nata il circa 1225 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Mary Menteith, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith. Morì nel 1286, nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.Menteith, Perthshire, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイア

ja.St Pierre and Miquelon: サイント-パエア エト ミクエロン

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Menteithが約1225年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteithは56歳，母Mary Menteithは42歳であった。彼女はWalter Stewart Earl Of Menteithとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1286年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで62歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーフォイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Menteith(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Menteith(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압르포일에 묻혔다.

mn.Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United King: Perth, Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Menteith nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Mary Menteith, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith. Ela faleceu em 1286, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Menteith родилась около 1225 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Menteith, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith. Она умерла в 1286 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности абирфоил, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Menteith nació aproximadamente 1225, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Mary Menteith, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith. Murió en 1286, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.
